_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure risk mitigation plans of action and milestones are in place.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct or oversee periodic model risk assessments, produce aggregate model risk reporting for senior management and the board, and ensure timely escalation of material model risk findings to appropriate governance bodies.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-006 (RM, cosine: 0.544), RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.539).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.365). Shared vocabulary: [ensure, risk]. DCWF-only terms [action, milestones, mitigation, place, plans] vs WIDAI-only terms [aggregate, appropriate, assessments, board, bodies, conduct] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.886, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Ensure risk mitigation plans of action and milestones are in place." and "Conduct or oversee periodic model risk assessments, produce aggregate model risk" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.556 > STS 0.365 (gap +0.190). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ensure, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [ensure, risk]. DCWF-only: [action, milestones, mitigation, place, plans]. WIDAI-only: [aggregate, appropriate, assessments, board, bodies, conduct].

signals.detail: STS 0.365 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.190 with low STS 0.365. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
